expectations.rationale: healthy senior — slight age-related variation OK
minor age-related stiffness possible but not concerning
no urgent flags for a stable senior

qualitative_criteria_zh: 不应该因为是老猫就默认拉低分数(状态确实稳定就给高分)
建议应该针对老猫(定期体检/关节支持/便利的猫砂位置),不是 kitten 的疫苗
应该正面引用历史记录,认可主人维持得好
qualitative_criteria_en: Should NOT default-low scores just because the cat is old
Suggestions tailored to senior (regular checkups, joint support, accessible litter) not kitten
Should positively reference history showing the owner is maintaining well
